CustomField.description: Logo source for the PDF header. Accepts: ContentDocument ID (069...), ContentVersion ID (068...), classic Document ID (015...), Attachment ID, Static Resource name, or file Title. The logo appears in the top-right corner of the PDF header.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Easiest option: Create a Static Resource (Setup > Static Resources > New) with your logo image, then enter the Static Resource Name here (e.g. CompanyLogo). OR: Upload to Salesforce Files and enter the ContentDocument ID (069...) from the URL. Formats: PNG, JPG, GIF.
CustomField.label: Logo Document Id
